overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia exploring a snowy mountainous region. The clip transitions from the dark interior of an abandoned wooden slaughterhouse to an outdoor winter landscape with a distant castle visible through the mist, ending with a trek through a shallow forest river.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned wooden slaughterhouse with hanging meat and blood stains

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks slowly through the dark interior, examining the carnage and hanging carcasses in the dilapidated structure

entered.detail: dark wooden interior with broken walls and blood-stained floors
damaged wooden ceiling beams with gaps showing sky above
animal carcasses and meat hooks suspended from the ceiling
wooden planks covered in blood and debris
thick wooden posts supporting the structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a dark, abandoned wooden slaughterhouse. Geralt explores the grim interior, walking past hanging meat carcasses and blood-stained floors. Light filters through gaps in the broken roof beams above, illuminating the carnage in the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain cliffside path with distant castle view

events.description: exits dark wooden structure into bright snowy mountain landscape

agents.ego_description: Geralt emerges from the building and walks along the snowy mountain path toward a wooden bridge

entered.detail: snow-covered rocky terrain with patches of exposed stone
steep rocky mountain wall rising beside the path
tall spired castle visible through the mist in the valley below
dense evergreen trees covering the distant slopes

segments.scene_description: Geralt steps out of the slaughterhouse into a vast winter landscape. The camera reveals a sweeping view of snow-covered mountains with a distant gothic castle spire visible through the overcast sky. He walks along the cliff edge on rocky, snow-dusted ground toward a wooden walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway along mountain cliff edge

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the elevated wooden bridge with the valley visible to his left

entered.detail: elevated wooden bridge with weathered planks
rough wooden posts and rails lining the walkway edge
deep mountain valley with mist and distant peaks

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to an elevated wooden walkway clinging to the mountain cliff. Geralt walks along the weathered planks, with wooden railings on one side and a steep drop into the misty valley on the other. The distant castle remains visible ahead as he progresses along the narrow structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow forest river in mountain valley

events.description: steps from rocky shore into shallow river water, creating splashes

agents.ego_description: Geralt wades through the shallow river water, moving between the snow-dusted pine trees

entered.detail: clear shallow water flowing over river stones
tall evergreen trees with snow on their branches

segments.scene_description: Leaving the wooden bridge behind, Geralt descends into a forested valley and steps into a shallow river. He wades through the clear water surrounded by dense pine trees dusted with snow, with rocky shores visible on both sides as he continues upstream through the wintry landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic darkness of a grim interior to the expansive, frozen wilderness of a mountain valley. It begins inside an abandoned wooden slaughterhouse, moving past hanging carcasses and blood-stained floors as light filters through broken roof beams. As Geralt steps outside, the enclosed space opens into a vast winter landscape of snow-covered mountains and a distant gothic castle spire under an overcast sky. The camera then follows him along a weathered wooden walkway clinging to a steep cliff edge before descending from the heights into a forested valley. Finally, the scene shifts to a shallow river where he wades through clear water surrounded by snow-dusted pine trees and rocky shores.
